	3rd-party-talk	Acknowledge (Backchannel)	Action-directive	Agree/Accept	Apology	Appreciation	Collaborative Completion	Conventional-closing	Conventional-opening	Declarative Yes-No-Question	Downplayer	Hold Before Answer/Agreement	No Answers	Offers, Options, Commits	Open-Question	Or-Clause	Other	Quotation	Reject	Repeat-phrase	Rhetorical-Question	Signal-non-understanding	Statement-non-opinion	Statement-opinion	Summarize/Reformulate	Thanking	Uninterpretable	Wh-Question	Yes-No-Question
